{{Quote|Daala, I am giving you enough power to turn any planet to slag.|[[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]]|<ref name="Jedi Search" />}}
The '''Maw fleet''' was the fleet of four [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyers]] built by [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] to guard [[Maw Installation]], under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala]]. The ships included were the ''[[Gorgon]]'', the [[Basilisk (Star Destroyer)|''Basilisk'']], the [[Hydra (Imperial I-class)|''Hydra'']], the ''[[Manticore]]'',<ref name="Jedi Search" /> and two [[Crusader-class corvette|''Crusader''-class corvettes]].<ref name="Message to Spacers">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/Mesop8|text=Message to Spacers 8}}</ref>

After the fleet left [[Maw Cluster/Legends|the Maw]] to attack the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the fleet was slowly destroyed. ''Hydra'' was lost when [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] flew the [[Sun Crusher]] through its bridge, ''Manticore'' was lost during the [[Attack on Mon Calamari]], ''Basilisk'' was [[Destruction of the Cauldron Nebula|destroyed]] when Kyp Durron used the Sun Crusher to destroy the [[Cauldron Nebula/Legends|Cauldron Nebula]]. Only the ''Gorgon'' survived to take part in the [[Battle of the Maw]] Installation, but was so damaged that it was scuttled upon reaching Supreme Warlord [[Blitzer Harrsk|Harrsk's]] forces in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]].
